title: cyperus albopilosus
intro: Cyperus albopilosus, also known as white-haired papyrus sedge, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Cyperus albopilosus include treating urinary tract infections, reducing swelling and pain, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions, often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
